category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to FSM.

target_market_label.zh: 密克罗尼西亚联邦（资源与发展部/州公用事业）
target_market_label.zht: 密克羅尼西亞聯邦（資源與發展部/州公共事業）

title.en: China-to-Micronesia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入密克罗尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入密克羅尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against FSM Department of Resources and Development context, Pohnpei and Chuuk state utility requirements, 120/240 V 60 Hz grid adaptation, SAE J1772 and CCS1 connector expectations, UL-direction EVSE safety, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与密克罗尼西亚联邦（FSM）国家资源与发展部背景、波奈佩与楚克州级公用事业要求、120/240 V 60 Hz电网适配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口预期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000电磁兼容证据、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與密克羅尼西亞聯邦（FSM）國家資源與發展部背景、波奈佩與楚克州級公共事業要求、120/240 V 60 Hz電網適配、SAE J1772和CCS1接口預期、UL方向EVSE安全、FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000電磁相容證據、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering FSM, the practical gaps are 120/240 V 60 Hz electrical revalidation against China’s 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline, conversion from GB/T 20234-style interfaces to SAE J1772 for AC and CCS1 for DC, UL-direction EVSE safety evidence such as UL 2594 or UL 2202, FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence for electronic and networked units, state utility site-connection approval, and typhoon-exposed island installation resilience. FSM has a compact-with-US context and state-based requirements, and the EV market is nascent and largely project-driven.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入FSM时，实际差距包括：相对中国220/380 V 50 Hz基线需进行120/240 V 60 Hz电气重新验证；接口从GB/T 20234体系转为交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；提供UL方向EVSE安全证据（如UL 2594或UL 2202）；电子和联网设备需FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；并获得州公用事业现场接入批准，同时满足飓风暴露岛屿的安装韧性。FSM虽与美国有紧密关系，但监管是州级与项目驱动，EV市场仍处于前期起步阶段。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入FSM時，實際差距包括：相對中國220/380 V 50 Hz基線需進行120/240 V 60 Hz電氣重新驗證；接口從GB/T 20234體系轉為交流SAE J1772和直流CCS1；提供UL方向EVSE安全證據（如UL 2594或UL 2202）；電子及聯網設備需FCC Part 15 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；並取得州公共事業現場接入批准，同時符合颶風暴露島嶼的安裝韌性。FSM雖與美國關係密切，但監管以州級與項目為主，EV市場仍處於起步階段。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DRD scope determination, state utility approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, typhoon-resilience design, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current FSM conformity, utility, electrical-code, telecom, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DRD范围裁定、州公用事业批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、抗飓风设计或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验FSM合规、州公用事业、 电气规范、通信、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DRD範圍裁定、州公共事業批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、抗颶風設計或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗FSM合規、州公共事業、電氣規範、通信、海關及項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
